ast.source: The top area of the app uses your accent color.
ast.target: The top area of the app uses your accent color.

ast.source: Active file and menu items use your accent color.
ast.target: Active file and menu items use your accent color.

ast.name: setDesc
ast.source: Headings use a different color for each size.
ast.target: Headings use a different color for each size.

ast.name: setDesc
ast.source: Turn off to use full-width status bar.
ast.target: Turn off to use full-width status bar.

ast.name: setDesc
ast.source: Use ellipses to fit file names on a single line.
ast.target: Use ellipses to fit file names on a single line.

ast.name: setDesc
ast.source: Display divider lines between workspace elements.
ast.target: Display divider lines between workspace elements.

ast.name: setDesc
ast.source: Hide tab bar and status bar, hover to display. Can be toggled via hotkey.
ast.target: Hide tab bar and status bar, hover to display. Can be toggled via hotkey.

ast.name: setDesc
ast.source: Images and videos fill the width of the line.
ast.target: Images and videos fill the width of the line.

ast.name: setDesc
ast.source: Turn consecutive images into columns — to make a new row, add an extra line break between images.
ast.target: Turn consecutive images into columns — to make a new row, add an extra line break between images.

ast.name: setDesc
ast.source: Default width for table and Dataview blocks.
ast.target: Default width for table and Dataview blocks.

ast.name: setDesc
ast.source: Used for text in the sidebars and tabs (default 13).
ast.target: Used for text in the sidebars and tabs (default 13).

ast.name: setDesc
ast.source: Number of characters per line for wide elements (default 50).
ast.target: Number of characters per line for wide elements (default 50).

ast.name: setDesc
ast.source: Percentage of space inside a pane that a line can fill (default 88).
ast.target: Percentage of space inside a pane that a line can fill (default 88).

ast.name: setDesc
ast.source: Overrides the text font defined in Obsidian appearance settings when in edit mode.
ast.target: Overrides the text font defined in Obsidian appearance settings when in edit mode.
